notes.text: St. Vincent and the Grenadines advances.

keyEvents.text: Goal!  St. Vincent and the Grenadines 0, Bermuda 1. Jai Bean (Bermuda) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Kane Crichlow.
Dante Leverock (Bermuda) is shown the yellow card for hand ball.
Daniel Cook (Bermuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1, Bermuda 1. Oalex Anderson (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) header from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Cornelius Stewart.

Goal!  St. Vincent and the Grenadines 2, Bermuda 1. Oalex Anderson (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Cornelius Stewart   following a fast break.
Oalex Anderson (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.

Goal!  St. Vincent and the Grenadines 3, Bermuda 1. Oalex Anderson (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Jahvin Sutherland.
Substitution, Bermuda. Luke Robinson replaces Kane Crichlow.
Substitution, Bermuda. Ne-Jai Tucker replaces Roger Lee.
Substitution, Bermuda. Lejaun Simmons replaces Daniel Cook.
Gavin Browne (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Najima Burgin replaces Gavin Browne.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Brad Richards replaces Sherwyn Alexander.
